new_classes.label_en: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22083049)
new_classes.label_de: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22083049)
new_classes.definition_en: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky produced by blending two or more Malt Scotch Whiskies distilled at different distilleries, presented in containers of more than 2 litres, classified under CN code 2208 30 49 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The key distinguishing criteria for CN 22083049 are: (1) the product is Blended Malt Scotch Whisky produced by blending two or more Malt Scotch Whiskies from different distilleries — captured via subClassOf BlendedMaltWhisky, hasDistilleryOrigin some MultipleDistilleryOrigin, and hasMashBasis some MaltedBarleyMashBasis; (2) it is presented in containers of more than 2 litres — captured via the decimalRange restriction (minExclusive 2) on maxContainerVolumeL and the disjointness (complement) with BlendedMaltWhiskySmallContainer; (3) the code string 22083049 is anchored via hasValue on codeString. Minor gap: the legal note does not explicitly state the alcoholic strength threshold for Scotch Whisky (typically ≥ 40% vol), which is inheritable from the parent Spirit class context but not axiomatised here, resulting in a slight coverage reduction to 0.9.
